creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 155593
Bump net-mgmt/lldpd to 0.7.14

Hi there

As the maintainer of net-mgmt/lldpd I submit this small patch to add the latest release 0.7.14 of lldpd the ports tree. It passed a poudriere testport inside 10.1 jail and has been shortly validated working against another lldpd daemon on Linux.

Looking forward for someone commiting this to the ports tree.

Best regards,
Mathieu
